plugins.name: Browser History Core
plugins.description: Shared ingestion primitives consumed by Chrome/Firefox/Edge history plugins. Installed automatically as a dependency; not user-toggleable.

description_i18n.zh-CN: Chrome/Firefox/Edge 历史插件共用的解析逻辑。作为依赖自动安装，无需手动启用。

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Calendar
plugins.description: Reads your calendar events and reminders so Magi can understand your schedule, meetings, and daily plans.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 读取日历中的事件和提醒，帮助 Magi 了解你的日程安排、会议记录和每日计划

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Chrome History
plugins.description: Reads your local Chrome browsing history so Magi can understand your interests, research habits, and frequently visited sites.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 读取本地 Chrome 浏览记录，帮助 Magi 了解你的兴趣方向、研究习惯和常访站点

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Edge History
plugins.description: Reads your local Microsoft Edge browsing history so Magi can understand your interests, research habits, and frequently visited sites.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 读取本地 Microsoft Edge 浏览记录，帮助 Magi 了解你的兴趣方向、研究习惯和常访站点

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Firefox History
plugins.description: Reads your local Firefox browsing history so Magi can understand your interests, research habits, and frequently visited sites.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 读取本地 Firefox 浏览记录，帮助 Magi 了解你的兴趣方向、研究习惯和常访站点

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Git Activity
plugins.description: Tracks your Git commits and repository checkouts so Magi can understand your coding projects and development workflow.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 追踪 Git 提交和分支操作，帮助 Magi 了解你的开发项目和工作流

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: NetEase Cloud Music
plugins.description: Reads your NetEase Cloud Music listening history so Magi can understand your music taste and listening habits.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 读取网易云音乐的收听记录，帮助 Magi 了解你的音乐喜好和收听习惯

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Photo Library
plugins.description: Scans your local photo library and reads metadata (time, location, camera) so Magi can build a record of your experiences and places visited.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 扫描本地照片，读取拍摄时间、地点等元数据，帮助 Magi 还原你的生活记录和去过的地方

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: App Usage
plugins.description: Tracks which apps you use and for how long, helping Magi understand your work focus, productivity patterns, and daily habits. Records are aggregated by clock hour, so the first entries appear on your timeline only after the current hour ends.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 记录各应用的使用时长，帮助 Magi 了解你的工作专注情况、效率规律和日常使用习惯。数据按整点小时聚合，第一条记录会在当前所在的整点小时结束后才出现在时间线上。

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Screenshot Timeline
plugins.description: Captures your screen, runs local OCR, and feeds magi memory.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 持续截屏并本地 OCR，把你的屏幕活动接入 magi 记忆。

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Steam Play History
plugins.description: Infers Steam gameplay sessions from local Steam files and playtime changes.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 根据本地 Steam 文件和游玩时长变化推断游戏会话

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: System Media
plugins.description: Tracks music and video playback from any app via system media controls, helping Magi understand what you listen to and watch.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 通过系统媒体控制记录任意应用的音乐和视频播放，帮助 Magi 了解你的收听和观看内容

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Telegram
plugins.description: Connects Magi to Telegram as a bot, so you can chat with Magi and receive responses directly in Telegram.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 将 Magi 接入 Telegram，通过机器人与 Magi 对话并接收消息回复

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Terminal History
plugins.description: Reads your shell command history so Magi can understand your development workflow, tools used, and technical habits.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 读取 Shell 命令历史，帮助 Magi 了解你的开发工作流、常用工具和技术操作习惯

plugins.author: Magi Team

plugins.name: Weixin
plugins.description: Connects Magi to Weixin through the official iLink bot gateway for direct chat messages.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 通过微信官方 iLink 机器人网关接入 Magi，让你可以直接在微信里与 Magi 对话

plugins.author: Magi Team
